# Reference Only: Generated Project Summary

This file is retained only as non-authoritative reference material.

- Do not treat this file as the active Copilot instruction surface for Bowties architecture, implementation behavior, or source-of-truth rules.
- Use `.github/copilot-instructions.md` for always-on project guidance.
- Use `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` for area-specific guidance.
- For LCC/OpenLCB protocol implementation guidance, use the scoped backend and `lcc-rs` instructions and consult the `OpenLCB_Java/` and `JMRI/` workspace folders as reference implementations.

The older generated content that previously lived here was removed because it mixed stale feature rollups, obsolete source-of-truth guidance, and non-Bowties template material into a file that looked authoritative.
